Compliance_Policies.Description: General business expenses for job completion
Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Usually tax exempt if purely business related
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt alone is not enough - you must provide proper tax receipts or invoices with sufficient proof

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Tax-free with sufficient proof
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is enough - no additional information needed

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Tax exempt if considered company property
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt alone is not enough - invoice must have Global People's name and details

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Tax exempt if relevant and reasonable
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt alone is not enough - invoice must have Global People's name and details

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Tax exempt if genuine business use
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is enough - no additional information needed

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Tax exempt if job-related
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is enough - no additional information needed

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Tax exempt
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt alone is not enough - you must get approval from your direct manager

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Tax exempt up to €20/month
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is enough - no additional information needed

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Not tax exempt - employees should be compensated
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is enough - no additional information needed

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Tax-free at flat rate of 20% of invoice, max €20/month
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is enough - no additional information needed

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Tax-free at flat rate of 20% of invoice, max €20/month
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt alone is not enough - invoice must include "Parakar Germany GmbH" at least in c/o

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Tax-free if separate personal phone used
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt alone is not enough - you must provide proof of separate personal phone

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Tax-free if separate personal phone used
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt alone is not enough - you must provide proof of separate personal phone

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Tax-free even if used for private purposes
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt alone is not enough - client must conclude contract and may purchase phone

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Tax-free at flat rate of 25% of invoice
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is enough - no additional information needed

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Tax-free with proper documentation
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt alone is not enough - invoice must include "Parakar Germany GmbH" at least in c/o

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Tax exempt €6/day, max €1,260/year
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is enough - no additional information needed

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Tax exempt max €600/year
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is enough - no additional information needed

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Not tax exempt (outside business travel)
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is enough - no additional information needed

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Cannot be reimbursed tax-free
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is enough - no additional information needed

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Will be taxed
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is enough - no additional information needed

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Not tax exempt
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is enough - no additional information needed

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Not tax exempt
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is enough - no additional information needed

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Tax exempt if third party involved
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt alone is not enough - entertainment must be offered to external third party, invoice must have Global People's name, address and VAT

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Tax-free at €0.30 per km
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is not applicable - you must provide mileage logbook with date, route, purpose, and odometer readings

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Tax exempt for KM reimbursement
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is not applicable - you must provide map with route (Google Maps sufficient) and complete travel report

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Will be taxed
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is enough - no additional information needed

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: €14/day over 8h, €28/day for 24h, €14 arrival/departure days
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is enough - per diems cover meals, accommodation and transport reimbursed separately

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: €28 for full day, €14 for arrival/departure days
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt alone is not enough - you must use specific travel expense report template

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Total allowance reduced to zero when all meals provided
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is enough - no receipts needed for per diem method

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Total allowance reduced to zero when all meals provided
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is enough - no receipts needed for per diem method

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Rates vary per country according to government rates
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt is enough - per diems cover meals, accommodation and transport reimbursed separately

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Per diem rates vary according to country of travel
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt alone is not enough - you must use specific travel expense report template

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: German government sets amounts per country, updated annually
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt alone is not enough - other costs like travel need receipts, per diem covers hotel costs only

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Per diems only tax-free for up to 3 months continuous travel
Compliance_Policies.Additional_Info_Description: Receipt alone is not enough - allowances for long stays over 3 months are taxable

Compliance_Policies.Gross-up_Rule: Cannot mix per diem method with actual expenses

Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Standard_Rule: Local Employer name must appear on invoices
Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Exception_Condition: Personal travel bookings where company name not technically possible
Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Expense_Type: Transportation - Flight, Train, Car Rental, Bus, Accommodation - Hotel, Other
Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Accept worker's name on invoice WHEN company name cannot be used for personal travel bookings (flights, hotels, trains, car rentals, etc.)

Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Standard_Rule: Local Employer address must appear on invoices
Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Exception_Condition: Personal travel bookings where company address not technically possible
Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Expense_Type: Transportation - Flight, Train, Car Rental, Bus, Accommodation - Hotel, Other
Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Accept worker's personal address on invoice WHEN worker books personal travel (logical extension of name exception)

Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Standard_Rule: Local Employer VAT number must appear on invoices
Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Exception_Condition: Personal travel bookings where company VAT not applicable
Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Expense_Type: Transportation - Flight, Train, Car Rental, Bus, Accommodation - Hotel, Other
Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Accept absence of company VAT number WHEN worker makes personal travel bookings (logical extension of name exception)

Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Standard_Rule: Local Employer name must appear on invoices
Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Accept either worker name OR company name on invoice (flexible policy for Atlas only)

Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Standard_Rule: Choose either per diem OR actual expenses
Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Expense_Type: Per Diem - Meals vs Meal Receipt - Actual
Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Reject mixed methods - IF Per Diem - Meals chosen THEN no Meal Receipt - Actual accepted for that specific trip

Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Exception_Condition: International travel over 3 months continuous at same location
Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Tax all per diems AFTER 3 continuous months at same location (3-Monatsfrist rule)
OVERRIDE: Flag as "long stay" IF stay >3 days/week AND extend long stay period IF gap <28 days between stays

Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Standard_Rule: Per diems at government rates are tax-free
Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Exception_Condition: Per diem offered above government-set rate
Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Tax the entire excess amount IF per diem exceeds government rate (not partial taxation)
OVERRIDE: Reduce per diem by 20% IF breakfast provided OR 40% IF lunch provided OR 40% IF dinner provided
OVERRIDE: Set daily allowance to zero IF all three meals (breakfast + lunch + dinner) are provided
OVERRIDE: Require Fahrtenbuch (mileage logbook) instead of receipts - MUST include date, route, purpose, odometer readings
OVERRIDE: Require map with route (Google Maps acceptable) and travel report instead of receipts

Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Exception_Condition: Using per diem method for meals
Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Do not require receipts WHEN Per Diem - Meals type is selected

Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Standard_Rule: Business-only use required for tax exemption
Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Exception_Condition: Mobile phone contract concluded by client
Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Allow tax-free status even with personal use IF client concludes the contract and may purchase phone

Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Standard_Rule: Actual business portion must be determined
Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Apply flat rate of 20% of invoice amount (maximum €20/month) instead of calculating actual business use

Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Standard_Rule: Actual business portion must be determined
Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Apply flat rate of 25% of invoice amount instead of calculating actual business use

Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Exception_Condition: Business assignment over 48 months at same non-primary location
Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Cap accommodation costs at double household amount AFTER 48 months at same location
OVERRIDE: Reset 48-month timer to zero IF business activity interruption lasts 6+ months
OVERRIDE: Require additional mandatory fields - employer name, address, and VAT amount WHEN invoice exceeds €150
OVERRIDE: Require comprehensive details - worker name/address, supplier tax ID, invoice serial number, dates, net amount, tax rate, VAT amount WHEN invoice exceeds €450

Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Standard_Rule: Business expenses are tax-exempt if business-related
Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Reject tax exemption UNLESS external third party is involved - same company employees only = not tax exempt

Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Expense_Type: Training - Business, Certification, Conference, Education - Professional
Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Require direct manager pre-approval for ALL training expenses regardless of job relevance
OVERRIDE: Require proof of separate personal phone AND tax-free status only IF worker has separate personal phone

Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Standard_Rule: Invoices can be in any currency
Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Require same currency for all receipts in submission AND clear exchange rate documentation

Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Expense_Type: Transportation - Flight, Train, Car Rental, Bus, Accommodation - International
Germany_Expense_Reimbursement_Rule_Excep.Override_Rule: OVERRIDE: Require A1 certificate as mandatory additional document for all international travel
OVERRIDE: Extend retention to 10 years for original invoices (digital storage acceptable)
